pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13.
Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; keeping 17 would result in bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or fail if strict source/target checks are enabled.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from reactive-streams dependency to rely on Spring Boot's managed version.
Remove explicit version from commons-lang3 dependency to rely on Spring Boot's managed version.
